events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess hot work no fire watch during + post-work period. Commercial construction, NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Hot work requires fire watch during and for sufficient period after (NFPA 51B 9.6? Fire watch maintained during hot work and for at least 60 minutes after completion, and final check at end of shift? Also OSHA 1926.352 fire prevention. No fire watch = non-compliant, high/critical risk. Work stage rough-complete. component_conditions installed-defective? non-compliant. Need produce JSON with required fields. decision fail. risk critical maybe high? Hot work without fire watch is serious fire hazard; critical. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80. value 0. sound_source empty? Since not audio task, maybe "". event_time 0, rate 0, order [], workable []. findings: no fire watch during and after hot work. actions: assign trained fire watch, maintain during and 60 min after, inspect area, implement hot work permit. rationale. references: NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Need ensure valid JSON.

    "No fire watch was provided during hot work operations.",
    "No post-work fire watch was maintained after hot work completion.",
    "Hot work permit and fire-safety precautions are not being implemented."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop hot work until a trained fire watch is assigned.",
    "Provide a dedicated fire watch during all hot work and for at least 60 minutes after completion.",
    "Inspect the work area and adjacent spaces for smoldering material or ignition.",
    "Implement and enforce a written hot work permit program before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J require a fire watch during hot work and for a sufficient period afterward to detect and extinguish ignition. The absence of any fire watch creates an imminent fire hazard and is non-compliant.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart J"
  ]
}
